'''''Star Wars Manga: The Empire Strikes Back'' 1''' is the first volume in the Empire Strikes Back manga series. It was illustrated by [[Toshiki Kudo]] and was based upon the original story by George Lucas.

[[File:SWManga_TESB1.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Cover art.]]
